title: SAT (College Board)
description: Register homeschooled students for the SAT, access official practice, and send scores to colleges through the College Board.

title: PSAT/NMSQT for Homeschoolers
description: Homeschool students can take the PSAT/NMSQT for National Merit Scholarship consideration by registering through a local high school.

title: ACT for Homeschool Students
description: Register for the ACT college admissions test, find test prep resources, and send scores to universities.

title: AP Exams for Homeschoolers
description: Homeschool students can take Advanced Placement (AP) exams for college credit by coordinating with a local AP school or authorized test center.

title: Seton Testing Services
description: Standardized achievement testing for homeschool families including CAT, TerraNova, and other nationally normed assessments.

title: BJU Press Testing & Evaluation
description: Achievement testing and evaluation services for homeschoolers, including Iowa Assessments and other standardized tests.

title: HSLDA College Scholarships
description: Guide to college scholarships for homeschooled students, including merit awards, organization-specific funds, and application tips.

title: Homeschool Legal Defense Association Patrick Henry College Scholarship
description: Scholarship opportunities at Patrick Henry College for homeschooled and classical education students.

title: National Merit Scholarship Program
description: Homeschool juniors can qualify for National Merit Scholarships by taking the PSAT/NMSQT and meeting program requirements.

title: Homeschool Foundation Emergency Fund
description: HSLDA's charitable arm offering need-based grants and scholarships to homeschooling families, including hardship and curriculum assistance.

title: Great Homeschool Conventions
description: Regional homeschool conventions with workshops, curriculum exhibitors, teen programs, and encouragement for the whole family.

title: Teach Them Diligently Convention
description: Christian homeschool conferences across the U.S. with speakers, curriculum hall, and family-focused sessions.

title: FPEA Florida Homeschool Convention
description: Florida Parent-Educators Association annual homeschool convention with vendors, workshops, and a graduation ceremony.

title: California Homeschool Network Family Expo
description: California homeschool network events, conferences, and community resources for families across the state.

title: Homeschool Conference Directory (HSLDA)
description: Directory of homeschool conferences and conventions across the United States compiled by HSLDA.

title: Classical Conversations National Conference
description: Classical Conversations practicum and community events for parents and students in the classical homeschool model.

title: Homeschool Scholarships Directory (Fastweb)
description: Curated list of college scholarships open to homeschooled students, including merit and need-based awards.

title: Sallie Mae Scholarship Search for Homeschoolers
description: Search thousands of college scholarships; many awards accept homeschooled applicants with a parent-prepared transcript.
